rules.name: Headbite
rules.description: Each time an attack made with a [HEADBITE] weapon targets a unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units), that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

rules.name: Acid Blood
rules.description: Each time a model with this ability loses a wound as a result of a melee attack, roll one D6: on a 6, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
